title: Webhook Delivery Timeout Due to Receiver Endpoint Slowdown
symptoms: Webhook delivery queue depth growing from 0 to 580,000
All dispatcher threads blocked waiting on slow partner endpoint
Webhook delivery latency exceeding 30 seconds for all partners
Partner webhook health dashboard showing red for all subscribers
Shared thread pool with zero available threads
root_cause: Shared thread pool architecture in webhook dispatcher allowed one slow partner endpoint to block all dispatcher threads, preventing delivery to healthy partners
resolution: Implemented per-partner thread pool isolation with individual timeout settings, added circuit breaker for slow endpoints, and drained the queued events with increased parallelism
preventive_actions: Implement per-partner thread pool isolation (bulkhead pattern)
Add circuit breaker per webhook subscriber with configurable thresholds
Set aggressive connection and read timeouts for webhook delivery (5s max)
Implement webhook delivery priority queues for critical partners
Add partner endpoint health monitoring with automatic suspension

timeline.event: Partner endpoint response times spike to 30 seconds
Webhook dispatcher thread pool fully blocked
Queue depth begins growing rapidly for all partners
Alert fires for webhook delivery delays
Jenny Liu identifies slow partner blocking shared pool
Per-partner thread isolation implemented as emergency fix
Circuit breaker deployed, slow partner webhooks suspended
Queue draining, healthy partner deliveries resuming

embedding_summary: Webhook delivery timeouts caused by one slow partner endpoint blocking all shared dispatcher threads. 580,000 events queued, all 120 partners experiencing delays for 45 minutes. Resolved by implementing per-partner thread pool isolation and circuit breakers.
